item.text: I’ll play Zap, clean up the 1 HP raider, push another raider onto the southeast fight to damage the scout, and keep recruiting.

item.command:
/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-017.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-017\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":4},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-017.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-017.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-017\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"target\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-017.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-017.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-017.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, removed P2'"'s 1 HP raider, heavily damaged the scout, reinforced the center lane, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: keep tempo with Zap, remove the easy high-attack body, apply capped deck damage into the next forward unit, and continue the raider stream from home toward the contested centers.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-017.board.result.json"'

/bin/zsh -lc 'set -euo pipefail
RUN=.games/e024-codex-rush-vs-engine-guided
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-017.deck.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-017\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":[{\"type\":\"playAction\",\"handIndex\":4},{\"type\":\"moveToBuy\"},{\"type\":\"endTurn\"}]}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- deck-turn --config rulesets/territory-v1-cost6-damagecap-responsewin-lead4-highmove-center6/deck.yaml --state \""'$RUN/deck.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-017.deck.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json"
cat > "$RUN/actions/turn-017.board.json" <<'"'JSON'
{\"schemaVersion\":1,\"turnId\":\"turn-017\",\"player\":\"P1\",\"actions\":{\"movements\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5},\"to\":{\"col\":5,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3},\"to\":{\"col\":7,\"row\":5}},{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-015-1\",\"from\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1},\"to\":{\"col\":8,\"row\":3}}],\"recruits\":[{\"unit\":\"P1-raider-turn-017-1\",\"type\":\"raider\",\"at\":{\"col\":10,\"row\":1}}],\"attacks\":[{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-011-1\",\"target\":\"P2-raider-turn-010-1\",\"deckDamage\":0},{\"attacker\":\"P1-raider-turn-013-1\",\"target\":\"P2-scout-start-2\",\"deckDamage\":1}],\"heals\":[],\"upgrades\":[]}}
JSON
bun run --silent cli -- board-turn --state \""'$RUN/board.json" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json" --actions "$RUN/actions/turn-017.board.json" --result "$RUN/results/turn-017.board.result.json"
bun run --silent playtest -- commit-turn --run "$RUN" --deck-result "$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json" --board-result "$RUN/results/turn-017.board.result.json" --summary "P1 played Zap, removed P2'"'s 1 HP raider, heavily damaged the scout, reinforced the center lane, and recruited another raider.\" --reasoning \"RUSH plan: keep tempo with Zap, remove the easy high-attack body, apply capped deck damage into the next forward unit, and continue the raider stream from home toward the contested centers.\" --strict-win
bun run --silent validate-run -- --strict --strict-deck --strict-win \""'$RUN/timeline.json"
printf '"'\\nDECK_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-017.deck.result.json"
printf '"'BOARD_FILE\\n'
jq -c '.' \""'$RUN/results/turn-017.board.result.json"'

item.text:
Committed and validated `turn-017`.

Deck line: played `zap`, moved to buy, ended turn. Bought nothing. Produced `4` money and `1` damage.

Board line: moved raiders to `(5,5)`, `(7,5)`, and `(8,3)`, recruited `P1-raider-turn-017-1` at `(10,1)`, removed `P2-raider-turn-010-1`, and dealt `7` damage to `P2-scout-start-2`.

Rationale: this keeps Zap tempo, clears a damaged high-attack unit, nearly removes P2’s scout, and continues the raider stream into the center fight. Strict validation passed.
